name: Ralsei
description:
He is wearing a large green wizard hat and round glasses, similar to his usual look.

Instead of his robe, he has a teacher outfit: a white coat, tie, and suspenders.

He’s holding a pointer stick in one hand and a book in the other, like he’s explaining a lesson.

Behind him is a chalkboard with math equations and symbols, suggesting he is teaching a class.

He’s sitting comfortably while teaching, with his paws visible in the foreground, which is part of the artist’s stylized perspective.
creator: Loona_512
